notes:
Works flawless after some configuration (not out of the box):
-> no sound: set launch options: PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%
-> sticky feet (player fails to jump on some occasions): within game: options, graphic options, vert. synch: ON
-> X-Box controller: not automatically detected, configure manually (use keyboard to select function to configure)
title: LEGO® Indiana Jones™: The Original Adventures
